subcodes.first_line: O thou who art steadfast in the Covenant! Thy letter of 27 August 1920 was received. In reply I am constrained to be brief, in view of circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای ثابت بر پیمان نامه ۲۷ اگست ۹۲۰ رسید در جواب مجبور باختصارم نظر باعمال
subcodes.subjects: @service to others; to the Cause of God, @Judas, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @words vs deeds
